posts.author: carlylaine (Carly )
posts.cookedHtml:
We have an automation recipe where by pushing a button, it sends the lead item to our “quoting” board AND creates a customer item in our “contacts” board.
I want to be able to link those items via automation. If the same automation is creating both of the items from that specific information, surely it could link them as well?
That would be a big help in our workflow.
